name: Village Chief's Gloves
description: Proof of completing Village Beginner Quests. Earned a present from the Chief.
condition: Complete all 1★ and 2★ Chief's Quests.

name: Village Chief's Hat
description: Proof of completing Village Intermediate Quests. Shows courage in the brutal cold.
condition: Complete all 3★ and 4★ Chief's Quests.

name: Village Chief's Scarf
description: Proof of completing Village Hard Quests. When worn, it is quite warm.
condition: Complete all 5★ Chief's Quests.

name: Village Chief's Coat
description: Proof you have completed all Pokke Quests. Proves one is a first-class hunter.
condition: Complete all of Pokke Chief's Quests.

name: Mane Necklace
description: Proof of slaying a Kirin. Retains the beauty of its thousand-year mane.
condition: Slay Kirin for the first time.

name: Blood Onyx
description: Proof of slaying an Akantor. Its brilliance captivates the soul.
condition: Slay Akantor for the first time.

name: King's Crown
description: Symbol of continued hunting success against giant monsters.
condition: Hunt all large Gold crown-sized monsters.

name: Miniature Crown
description: Symbol of continued hunting success against small beasts.
condition: Hunt all small Gold crown-sized monsters.

name: Bronze Medal
description: Proof of mastering all Gathering Hall ★ and ★★ Quests. No longer a novice.
condition: Complete all 1★ and 2★ Gathering Hall Quests.

name: Silver Medal
description: Proof of mastering all Gathering Hall 3★ to 5★ Quests. Shows true courage.
condition: Complete all 3★-5★ Gathering Hall Quests.

name: Gold Medal
description: Proof of mastering all Gathering Hall 6★ to 8★ Quests. A true achievement.
condition: Complete all 6★ to 8★ Gathering Hall Quests.

name: Black Belt Badge
description: Proof of passing all Battle Training at the Training School. This protects you.
condition: Complete all Battle Training Quests.

name: Expert Badge
description: Proof of passing all Special Training at the Training School.
condition: Complete all Special Training Quests.

name: Legend Badge
description: Proof of passing all Group Training at the Training School. Sign of true power.
condition: Complete all Group Training Quests at least once.

name: Rare Species Report
description: Record of the incredibly powerful colored monsters. Confirms all rare breeds.
condition: Hunt all subspecies monsters at least once, Fatalis' variants isn't required for this award.

name: Ecology Research Report
description: Report created from records of captured monsters. Proves successful captures.
condition: Capture all trappable monsters at least once.

name: Azure Stone
description: Pure piece of Machalite Ore. Beautiful, it is proof of Mining Area development.
condition: Purchase all Mining upgrades for Pokke Farm.

name: Great Hornfly
description: Rare insect found in this area. Proves development of insect gathering area.
condition: Purchase all Bug Gathering upgrades for Pokke Farm.

name: Springnight Carp
description: Splendid pink-scaled fish during spring. Proves Fishing Pier development.
condition: Purchase all fishing pier upgrades for Pokke Farm.

name: Dosbiscus
description: A rare red flower found in an area with deep snow. Proof of Field development.
condition: Purchase all field upgrades for Pokke Farm.

name: Grateful Letter
description: A Letter from a Felyne Chef saying, "Thanks, you are a great master, meow!"
condition: Level up all 5 Felyne Chefs to 9.

name: Sage's Bracelet
description: Proof of combining proficiency. Feels like you can use anything, anytime.
condition: Complete all combinations on the combo list.

name: Wyvernian Artisan's Hammer
description: Dirty, but divine smithing hammer of a famed Wyverian. A weapon collector's seal.
condition: Get 4 fully upgraded weapon for each weapon type.

name: Hunter's Progress
description: Map recording your hunting trek. Proof of travel to many game areas.
condition: Complete 20 Quests in Jungle, Snowy Mountains, Desert, Volcano, Forest and Hills and the Tower.

name: Nekoht's Whiskers
description: Proof of completing Nekoht 7★ Quests. Try it on, and become a majestic cat!
condition: Complete all 7★ Nekoht Quests.

name: Nekoht's Bell
description: Proof of completing Nekoht 8★ Quests. A mysterious-sounding, handcrafted bell.
condition: Complete all 8★ Nekoht Quests.

name: Nekoht's Coat
description: Proof of completing Nekoht 9★ Quests. A classy coat. Guild's crest in lining.
condition: Complete all 9★ Nekoht Quests.

name: Pokke Village Gourd
description: Proof of completing all Pokke Urgent Quests. Warm up with a single sip.
condition: Complete all Urgent Quests for Pokke/Nekoht.

name: Orichalcum Shield
description: Proof of mastering all Gathering Hall G-Level 1★ Quests. Exemplary hunter.
condition: Complete all G1★ Gathering Hall Quests.

name: Platinum Shield
description: Proof of mastering all Gathering Hall G-Level 2★ Quests. Talk of the town.
condition: Complete all G2★ Gathering Hall Quests.

name: Gold Shield
description: Proof of mastering all Gathering Hall G-Level 3★ Quests. Renowned worldwide.
condition: Complete all G3★ Gathering Hall Quests.

name: Supreme Hunter's Crest
description: Cleared all of the Pokke and Gathering Quests. No one can even come close!
condition: Complete all Quests from Pokke Village & Gathering Hall.

name: Igneous Ring
description: Proof of slaying a Fatalis. Beneath its breathtaking sparkle lurks calamity.
condition: Slay G-Rank Fatalis for the first time.

name: Ring of Fire
description: Proof of slaying a Red Fatalis. Its mighty flames brings destruction to all.
condition: Slay G-Rank Red/Crimson Fatalis for the first time.

name: Powder-White Crown
description: Proof of slaying a White Fatalis. Its long, flowing white mane reveals its age.
condition: Slay G-Rank White Fatalis for the first time.

name: Gold Snowshoes
description: Proof of successful Rajang hunt. Top-class snowshoes made of its golden hairs.
condition: Slay the Golden/Furious Rajang in G3★'s "Child of Destruction" for the first time.

name: Ukanlos Bead
description: Proof of slaying an Ukanlos. It is said to allow itss bearer into Heaven.
condition: Slay Ukanlos for the first time.

name: Epic Hunts Armband
description: Proof of tough struggles overcome and battles won during arduous Epic Hunts.
condition: Complete all Epic Hunts Quests.

name: Warrior's Medal
description: Proof of passing all G-Lvl Training at the Training School. What gusto!
condition: Complete all G-Lvl Training Quests.

name: Guardian's Award
description: Proof of devotion to the Town and Fortress, saving them from many a crisis.
condition: Complete 20 Quests in Town & the Fortness.

name: Flower Bonquet from the Guild
description: Earned an exorbitant number of Guild Points. A bouquet of Dosbiscus in full bloom.
condition: Gain a million guild points.

name: Adventurer's Helm
description: Proof of collecting rare treasure. Present from Treshi.
condition: Get a gold crown on all treasure quests and find all rare treasures in each map.

name: Trenya's Flag
description: Proof of funding Trenya on an incredible number of the most expensive adventures.
condition: Send Trenya to 100 trips using 1500 Pokke Points.

name: The Ultimate Catnip
description: Proof of Comrade gratitude for unlocking all Comrade Skills for one of your own.
condition: Get all skills for one of your Felyne comrades.

name: Letter for my Fearless Leader
description: A letter from a Felyne Comrade saying, "Happy to be your partner, meow!"
condition: Gain maximum (5) hearts for at least 5 of your Felyne comrades.

name: Member's Card
description: Proof of creating numerous numbers of Special weapons. Equipment shop's VIP card.
condition: Buy 50 unique G-Lvl Weapons.

name: Wyverian Artisan's Mitten
description: Proof of a collector of armor. Mitt of a highly prolific armor artisan.
condition: Purchase 5 sets of either rarity 9 or 10 armor.

name: Hunter's Miracle
description: Map recording your hunting trek. Proof of travel to all game areas.
condition: Complete 20 Quests in Old Desert, Old Jungle, Old Swamp and Old Volcano.
